emails.subject: NDA's
emails.body: I have a bunch of NDA's coming thru, so I thought I'd send you an email: 1. Leslie drafted an NDA yesteeday with Proxicom, Inc. I don't know if she ran it by you... 2. Ariba, Inc. 3. Commerce One, Inc. 4. Exodus Communications, Inc. 5. Financial Settlement Matrix 6. Interliant, Inc. 7. Inwarehouse.com 8. Oracle Corporation 11. Sabre Corporation
